chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْأَوْقَاتِ وَ الْحَالَاتِ الَّتِي تُرْجَى فِيهَا الْإِجَابَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The timings and the situation in which the Answer is hoped for

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/39)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/39)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يُحِبُّ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ كُلَّ عَبْدٍ دَعَّاءٍ فَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالدُّعَاءِ فِي السَّحَرِ إِلَى طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ فَإِنَّهَا سَاعَةٌ تُفَتَّحُ فِيهَا أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ وَ تُقَسَّمُ فِيهَا الْأَرْزَاقُ وَ تُقْضَى فِيهَا الْحَوَائِجُ الْعِظَامُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Jamourany, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Sandal, from Abu Al Sabbah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Loves from the Momineen of Hisazwj servant, every servant who supplicates. Therefore, it is upon you with the supplication during the pre-dawn up to the emergence of the sun, for it is a time in which the doors of the skies are Opened up and the sustenance are distributed, and in which the great needs are Fulfilled’.
en.sarwar: 9. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from al-Jamurani from al- Hassan ibn Ali ibn abu Hamza from Sandal from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinani from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, from among His believing people loves every prayerful one. You should pray during the last part of the night until sunrise; it is the hour in which the doors of heaven open up, sustenance is distributed and people in need are granted great help.”
